articles.author: Jeremy B. White
articles.title: Tom Steyer is running the most expensive campaign in America. It might win him the California governorship. - Politico
articles.description: The Democratic billionaire is moving quickly to take advantage of a wide-open California governor’s race.
articles.content: And with Swalwells exit in the face of sexual misconduct and assault allegations, Steyer more than any other contender here is picking up the pieces. On Tuesday, the heavy-hitting California Teachers… [+6110 chars]
